arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Man United live match updates and team news from Villa Park
arts.sum: But after being held to a 2-2 draw by newly-promoted Ipswich Town at Portman Road last weekend, Villa will want to claim a fourth consecutive victory in front of their home fans before the October international break. The Spaniard's first game in charge of Villa was against United and that 3-1 win is the club's solitary victory in their past 25 Premier League home fixtures against the Red Devils.

arts.ttl: Morgan Rogers has made his stance on England call-up clear
arts.sum: After playing his part in Villa's historic win against Bayern, Rogers was asked about the possibility of being included in Carsley's England squad, which was named the following day. Aston Villa forward Morgan Rogers won't be dwelling on Lee Carsley's decision not to hand him his first senior England call-up for the October internationals.

arts.ttl: 'He should've joined AC Milan' - Ruud Gullit makes Manchester United transfer statement
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee has struggled to get going at Manchester United after a summer move from Bologna, with Ruud Gullit fearing the forward will become the latest high-profile player to flop at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: €50m Man United talent wants Erik ten Hag to stay “longer” to disrupt unusual pattern
arts.sum: Man United star Matthijs de Ligt has admitted that he wants Erik ten Hag to remain as manager of the Premier League club for “longer” as the Dutch coach’s future at Old Trafford remains under threat. arts.ttl: ‘I played with Cristiano Ronaldo at Man Utd – Cole Palmer shares same special quality’
arts.sum: Gary Neville played alongside Cristiano Ronaldo for six years at Manchester United, and the Red Devils legend has confessed that Cole Palmer shares a special quality with the Portuguese GOAT

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Manchester United LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction

arts.ttl: Steve Holland makes decision on Man Utd role if Gareth Southgate is appointed boss
arts.sum: Steve Holland was Gareth Southgate's sidekick throughout their time at England but the assistant manager is now keen to step out alone as he waits for an opportunity

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Nottingham Forest: Jadon Sancho attempting to match all-time record
arts.sum: Chelsea winger Jadon Sancho will be attempting to equal an all-time record when the Blues square off against Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Sunday.
